get.description: Returns the scaffold root response to confirm the API is reachable.

post.description: Returns a bearer JWT for an active admin account.
post.summary: Log in as an admin user

get.description: Returns the active admin represented by the bearer token.
Returns active customer attribute groups with active options ordered for the public quiz.
Returns active options for one active attribute group.
get.summary: List active options for an attribute group code

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated attribute groups.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create attribute groups. Group codes are immutable after creation.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read attribute group details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable attribute group fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate attribute groups.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read options for one attribute group.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create options under an attribute group. Option codes are immutable after creation.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read attribute option details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable attribute option fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate attribute options.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated categories.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create categories.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read category details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable category fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate categories.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can upload one JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image to Cloudinary. Metadata is stored locally for later product/pack attachment workflows.

file.description: JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image file to upload.

400.description: Missing file, invalid image type, invalid metadata, or file too large.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can list uploaded media assets. Deleted assets are hidden unless includeDeleted is true.
OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can inspect one active media asset.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update local metadata only. This does not replace the uploaded Cloudinary asset.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can delete the Cloudinary image and mark the local media record as deleted. This does not remove historical references from existing records.

post.description: Uploads one JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image to Cloudinary and attaches it to a product as COVER or GALLERY. New covers demote the previous cover to GALLERY.

patch.description: Updates product image display positions in a transaction. Duplicate IDs, duplicate positions, negative positions, and foreign images are rejected.
Updates role, alt text, or position. Promoting an image to COVER demotes the previous cover.

delete.description: Deletes the product image relationship and removes the Cloudinary asset when no other relationship references it.

post.description: Uploads one JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image to Cloudinary and attaches it to a pack as COVER or GALLERY. New covers demote the previous cover to GALLERY.

put.description: Uploads a new image, replaces the category image relationship transactionally, and then attempts to delete the old Cloudinary asset.
put.summary: Create or replace a category image

put.description: Uploads one shade/swatch image for a product reference. Replacement keeps the old relation until the new upload and database write succeed.

201.description: Product reference image created or replaced.

put.summary: Create or replace a product reference image

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated brands.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create brands.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read brand details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable brand fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate brands.

get.description: Returns active quiz questions with active selectable options ordered by step.

post.description: Validates quiz answers, required questions, duplicate groups, and option membership before creating a customer profile and answers in one transaction.

400.description: Invalid group, invalid option, duplicate answer, or missing required answer.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated quiz questions.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create quiz questions and mapped answer options. Only one active question is allowed per attribute group.

409.description: Only one active question is allowed per attribute group.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update quiz question step order in bulk.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read quiz question details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update quiz question fields and replace options. Active uniqueness per attribute group is enforced.

409.description: Only one active question is allowed per attribute group.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate quiz questions.

get.description: Returns active products ordered by creation date with category, brand, references, and compatibility attributes.
Returns one active product with category, brand, references, and compatibility attributes.
get.summary: Get an active product by ID

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated products with admin-only stock/count summaries.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create catalog products.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read full product details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable product fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can archive a product and deactivate its references.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read references for one product.
get.summary: List product references for a product

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create product references and compatibility attributes.

409.description: Duplicate reference code, SKU, or barcode.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read product reference details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update references and replace compatibility attributes.

409.description: Duplicate reference code, SKU, or barcode.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate product references.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update stock, reserved quantity, and low-stock threshold. This does not reserve or deduct stock automatically.

get.description: Returns active packs with attributes, pack items, products, and fixed product references where configured.
Returns one active pack with attributes, items, products, fixed references, and useful product references.
get.summary: Get an active pack by ID

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated packs with admin metadata.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create draft or active packs. Active packs must pass item, pricing, and attribute validation.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read full pack details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update packs. Nested items and attributes are replaced transactionally when provided.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can archive a pack without deleting historical relations.

post.description: Loads profile answers and active packs/products/references, selects best references, stores the recommendation session/results/items, and returns ranked packs with score details.

400.description: Profile has no answers or request validation failed.

post.summary: Generate recommendations for a customer profile

get.description: Returns a previously generated recommendation session and ranked results.
OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read paginated recommendation scoring rules.

post.description: OWNER and ADMIN can create scoring rules. Rule codes are immutable after creation.
OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can preview current rule effects. This endpoint does not create recommendation sessions, results, or items.

200.description: Preview recommendations without persisting a session.

get.description: OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can read recommendation rule details.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can update mutable recommendation rule fields.

delete.description: OWNER and ADMIN can soft-deactivate recommendation rules.

post.description: Creates or reuses a customer, creates a default delivery address, creates order item snapshots from a selected recommendation result, and creates initial status history.

400.description: Invalid recommendation result, inactive selected pack/product/reference, or out-of-stock selected reference.

post.summary: Create a Cash on Delivery order

get.description: Returns a limited public order summary. It intentionally excludes phone, address, notes, items, and status history.
OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can search, filter, sort, and paginate orders.
OWNER, ADMIN, and STAFF can view full order details, customer/address data, selected pack, items, recommendation summary, and status history.

patch.description: OWNER and ADMIN can move an order through the enforced workflow. COD orders are marked PAID on DELIVERED and REFUNDED on RETURNED after payment.

info.title: Beauty Pack Recommendation API
info.description: Backend API for beauty-pack personalization, recommendations, COD orders, and administration

bearer.description: Paste the JWT access token returned by POST /auth/login.

email.description: Admin email address configured for the local/backend environment.

password.description: Admin password. Never use a real password in examples or shared docs.

altText.description: Accessible alt text or internal image description.

usageContext.description: Optional usage context for future attachment workflows.

relatedEntity.description: Optional entity type this asset is intended for.

relatedEntityId.description: Optional entity ID this asset is intended for.

imageId.description: Product or pack image relation ID.

altText.description: Alternative text or internal image description.

attributeOptionCode.description: Attribute option code selected for the group.

sourceChannel.description: Customer acquisition channel. Defaults to DIRECT when omitted.

answers.description: Non-empty list of quiz answers. One answer per attribute group.

customerProfileId.description: Customer profile ID returned by POST /quiz/profiles.

reasonSummary.example: Strong match for your selected profile.

recommendationResultId.description: Recommendation result selected by the customer.

fullName.description: Customer display name for order fulfillment.

phone.description: Customer phone number used to create or reuse a customer.

whatsappPhone.description: Optional WhatsApp phone number for future customer contact.

notes.description: Optional order note for admin fulfillment.
